query: SELECT cf.id, cf.projectId, cf.name, cf.startDate, cf.preDevMonths, cf.constructionMonths, cf.handoverMonths, p.name as project_name FROM cf_projects cf LEFT JOIN projects p ON cf.projectId = p.id ORDER BY cf.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT cf.id, cf.projectId, cf.name, cf.startDate, cf.preDevMonths, cf.constructionMonths, cf.handoverMonths, p.name as project_name FROM cf_projects cf LEFT JOIN projects p ON cf.projectId = p.id ORDER BY cf.id;
